hints: An f-string starts with f before the opening quote: print(f"..."). Without the f, the curly braces are treated as literal characters.
Put a variable inside curly braces to substitute its value: print(f"Age: {age}") prints Age: 36.
You can put two variables in one f-string with a space between them: f"Name: {first_name} {last_name}". The Bio line uses three variables the same way.
